'Pursues Franchise Development Nationwide' - first 15 locations across TX, FL, MN, OK, LA, CO. Current franchise page (iron24.com/franchise/) imposes no geographic restriction; ~19 locations open across U.S. and Canada.
Available Markets lists all 50 U.S. states + DC; 'territories throughout the country are now available for development.' 4,000+ locations open and in development.

brands.name: Just Poke

statesOpen.note: Pacific Northwest brand with ~20+ locations in Puget Sound/Washington; franchising page invites inquiries 'to discuss the opportunities in your area'

brands.note: Only WA is a documented active franchise market; coming-soon units in WA, AZ, and UT and stated ambition to 'expand into select markets across the US and Canada,' but no published state-availability list.

brands.name: KeyGlee
brands.note: Still actively offering franchises as of 2026 - official franchising page (https://www.keyglee.com/franchising) shows 'Apply Now' and 'Claim Your Area' - but publishes no state-level availability list. System has contracted sharply from its ~180-unit peak, so availability claims beyond 'inquire for your area' would be guesswork; omitted.

brands.note: Available in 36 states (excludes 14 franchise-registration states pending compliance); 500+ territories primed for franchising.

brands.name: Level Up Automation
brands.note: No current state-availability evidence. Official franchise page (levelupyourhome.com/pages/franchise) says it is 'evaluating franchise owners' but lists no states; at 2022 launch it was registered in FL, NY, and CA (levelupyourhome.com blog), and Franchise Gator indicates the program 'reached its current goals' with more opportunities 'coming soon.' Omitted rather than guessed.
